name: Bluebot Mini
positioning: Compact entry-level smart water meter for smaller residential-style pipes.
fit_notes: Good when the buyer has reliable Wi-Fi near the meter location.
Good for smaller accessible pipes in the website-listed range.
cautions: Confirm current pricing, package, and data-plan details on the website before quoting.
Confirm actual pipe OD/material and access before treating this as a final fit.

name: Bluebot Flagship
positioning: Broad-capability smart water meter for common 3/4 inch to 2 inch pipes.
fit_notes: Good when Wi-Fi is available and the pipe is in the common 3/4 inch to 2 inch range.
Good default website-listed option when the buyer wants stronger capability than Mini.
cautions: Confirm current pricing, package, and data-plan details on the website before quoting.
Confirm actual pipe OD/material and access before treating this as a final fit.

name: Bluebot ProLink
positioning: Enterprise-grade long-range option for common 3/4 inch to 2 inch pipes where Wi-Fi is not available or not preferred.
fit_notes: Good when the customer says there is no reliable Wi-Fi at the meter location.
Good for remote, commercial, or long-range connectivity needs in the website-listed pipe range.
cautions: Confirm network availability and selected backhaul option before quoting.
Confirm actual pipe OD/material and access before treating this as a final fit.

name: Bluebot Prime Wi-Fi
positioning: Wi-Fi option for larger 2.5 inch, 3 inch, or 4 inch pipes.
fit_notes: Good when the pipe is larger than 2 inches and Wi-Fi is available.
Website-listed for 2.5 inch, 3 inch, and 4 inch pipe options.
cautions: Confirm exact pipe size and OD; larger-pipe fit is more sensitive to correct sizing.
Confirm current pricing, package, and data-plan details on the website before quoting.

name: Bluebot ProLink Prime
positioning: Long-range no-Wi-Fi-required option for larger 2.5 inch, 3 inch, or 4 inch pipes.
fit_notes: Good when the pipe is larger than 2 inches and Wi-Fi is unavailable or not preferred.
Website-listed as a larger-pipe long-range option.
cautions: Confirm network availability and selected backhaul option before quoting.
Confirm exact pipe size and OD; larger-pipe fit is more sensitive to correct sizing.
